title: thelypteris viridis
intro: Thelypteris viridis, also known as the Green Maiden fern, is a species of fern native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Thelypteris viridis can be used as a tea, tincture, or infused in hot water to release its medicinal properties.
